rule: Real pilot can proceed only after blocked critical/high items close privately.
Continue fake-data rehearsal while private approvals and proofs are completed.
Stop real pilot if authority, privacy, IDS, support, or official-route owner declines.
Repeat scripts after remediations and before real invites.
Archive as public concept if private pilot is paused long-term.
Continue Barayamal path while Toastmasters official route remains blocked.
Continue member tester only if official route owner reviews boundary.
Give provider the scorecard and blockers, not private evidence.
Configure a private fake-data Decidim sandbox and rerun required scripts.
Publish only aggregate fake-data learning and next-step caveats.
